# BP-85 safe variant: ServeHTTP handles a missing or wrong-typed context value.
lang: go
file: BP-85-variant-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type requestHandler struct{}
type roleKey struct{}

func (requestHandler) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	role, ok := r.Context().Value(roleKey{}).(string)
	if !ok {
		http.Error(w, "missing role", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_ = role
}
